nasb.text: The angel of the Lord appeared to him and said to him, “The Lord is with you, O valiant warrior.”

esv.text: And the angel of the Lord appeared to him and said to him, “The Lord is with you, O mighty man of valor.”

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者向基甸顯現，對他說：“大能的勇士啊，耶和華與你同在。”

ccb.text: 耶和华的天使向基甸显现，说：“英勇的战士啊，耶和华与你同在。”
